description: A2A Plane source-public execution orchestrator schema. Converts an approved evidence packet into a deterministic, explicitly operator-gated execution plan with dry-run/simulate mode, scanner/history binding, rollback/abort runbook, idempotency/replay protection, and preflight failure semantics. This round never executes approval, release, or visibility changes.

gates.title: Approval packet locked and immutable
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Approval packet is not locked or has changed since the last approval rehearsal; execution plan cannot be derived.
evidence: Approval packet is pinned by commit SHA, run identifier, and timestamp.
Approval packet hash matches the last approved rehearsal output.
No gate status, evidence URL, or evidence packet has changed since the locked version.

gates.title: Execution plan structural integrity
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Execution plan is structurally incomplete or missing required sections.
evidence: Execution plan includes: executionMode, actionManifest, scannerBinding, rollbackRunbook, abortRunbook, idempotencyKey, replayProtection, preflightChecks.
All action manifest entries have target repo, action, dry-run flag, and rollback step.
Deterministic rendering produces identical output for identical input.

gates.title: Scanner/history evidence binding
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Scanner and history evidence is not bound to the execution plan; execution cannot proceed.
evidence: External scanner evidence (gitleaks/trufflehog) is bound by commit SHA and scan timestamp.
History scan evidence is bound by commit SHA range.
Scanner evidence postdates the last commit touching secrets-adjacent or evidence paths.
Binding is immutable: execution plan references specific scanner run identifiers.

gates.title: Rollback and abort runbook
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Rollback or abort runbook is missing, incomplete, or would cause side effects.
evidence: Rollback procedure is documented step-by-step for each action in the manifest.
Abort procedure is documented for each preflight failure mode.
Both rollback and abort are no-live: they do not deploy, restart services, send provider messages, mutate databases, or change visibility.
Rollback/abort has been dry-run validated at least once.

gates.title: Idempotency and replay protection
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Idempotency key or replay protection is missing; duplicate execution could occur.
evidence: Unique idempotency key is derived from run identifier, approval packet hash, and lane.
Replay detection confirms no prior execution plan with the same idempotency key exists.
Duplicate execution prevention is proven: an identical plan submitted twice produces the same result or a clean rejection.
Idempotency key is redacted in public evidence but referenced by hash.

gates.title: Preflight failure semantics
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Preflight checks are not defined or failure behavior is unspecified.
evidence: Preflight checklist is explicit: git status clean, branch exists, scanner pass, no dirty working tree, no untracked bootstrap files, approval packet still locked.
Each preflight failure mode has a documented abort path.
Preflight failures produce a BLOCKED outcome, never a silent skip or partial execution.
Preflight checks are idempotent: running them twice produces the same result.

gates.title: Action manifest determinism
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Action manifest is not deterministic or contains ambiguous entries.
evidence: Every action lists target repo, action type, dry-run-safe flag, and rollback step.
Actions are ordered: preflight → scanner → plan → (operator gate) → no further actions in this round.
No ambiguous or conditional actions that depend on runtime state.
Manifest is reproducible: identical input produces identical ordered action list.

gates.title: Explicit operator execution gate
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Operator has not explicitly approved execution; plan remains in dry-run/simulate mode.
evidence: Operator approval is a linked issue/PR comment that explicitly names source-public execution.
Approval is separate from rehearsal approval and does not bundle deploys, restarts, DB mutations, provider sends, terminal ACKs, secret rotation, history rewrite, or force-push.
Without this gate, execution mode is locked to dry-run/simulate.

gates.title: Cross-broker handoff evidence
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Cross-broker handoff evidence is missing or incomplete; execution plan cannot be trusted across brokers.
evidence: Broker approval-intent/final-execution ledger model is documented with idempotency and replay/no-duplicate semantics.
Cross-broker handoff evidence links at least two broker lanes.
Handoff evidence postdates the last commit touching broker ledger, handoff, or conference-fan-in behavior.

gates.title: Broker read-only readiness
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Broker readiness evidence is missing or does not pass read-only health, worker matrix, queue/stale closeout checks.
evidence: Broker health check passes with ok=true.
Worker capacity matrix confirms all expected workers online.
Queue/stale closeout confirms queued=0, claimed=0, running=0, stale=0.

gates.title: Plugin operator-facing status and projection
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Plugin operator-facing status/projection evidence is missing or does not confirm read-only state.
evidence: Plugin configuration is read-only; no live Telegram/provider send configured.
Operator-facing status confirms notification delivery is disabled or projection-only.
Plugin approval separation is verified.

gates.title: Docker runner evidence
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Docker runner scan/history evidence is missing or does not pass deterministic validation.
evidence: Runner artifact manifest is present and valid.
Deterministic scanner/history scan profile passes.
Redacted artifact bundle contains no runtime/bootstrap files or secrets.

gates.title: Public/private boundary
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Repository remains private; public transition is NO_GO.
evidence: GitHub metadata shows repository is still private.
Docs and examples contain no private endpoints, provider identifiers, raw session dumps, or host-specific private paths.

gates.title: OpenClaw runtime/bootstrap hygiene
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Runtime/bootstrap context files would enter the branch or evidence; stop before PR/Done evidence.
evidence: Branch diff excludes all denyPaths.
Artifact and PR/issue evidence exclude all denyPaths and raw runtime/session context.

gates.title: Redacted evidence policy
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Evidence contains raw secrets, private paths, provider identifiers, terminal ACK mutations, or raw session dumps.
evidence: Issue and PR evidence includes commands, exit statuses, finding counts/classes, commit SHA, and linked artifacts only.
Matched secret values, host-specific private paths, provider IDs, Telegram IDs, and raw session dumps are never pasted.
